name: Dropbox
description: Search and browse Dropbox Dash content via the Dropbox Dash MCP server.
notes: Official Dropbox Dash MCP server runs locally over stdio and authenticates with a Dropbox app key.
installHint: Runs via uvx from the official GitHub repo — no manual clone needed. Create a Dropbox app (developers.dropbox.com) to get an APP_KEY.

envFields.label: Dropbox App Key
envFields.helperText: Create a Dropbox app (developers.dropbox.com) to obtain the App Key.
